services.title: AI Chatbot Development
services.description: Smart virtual assistants that answer customer questions, capture leads and improve response time.

services.title: Business Automation
services.description: Custom workflow automation that reduces repeated manual tasks and improves team productivity.

services.title: Data Analytics
services.description: Interactive dashboards and insights that help managers understand performance and make informed decisions.

services.title: Digital Product Planning
services.description: Structured planning and interface design for businesses preparing new digital products.

services.title: Web Application Development
services.description: Secure, responsive and maintainable full-stack web systems for business operations.

services.title: Digital Employee Experience
services.description: Self-service tools and knowledge systems that help employees work faster and smarter.

projects.title: Healthcare Virtual Assistant
projects.description: A chatbot solution that helps patients find service information and appointment guidance.
projects.details: The solution provides a simple chatbot interface, customer enquiry capture and admin-controlled FAQ training.

projects.title: Retail Demand Dashboard
projects.description: An analytics dashboard that visualises sales enquiries and customer demand patterns.
projects.details: The dashboard shows enquiry trends, categories and service popularity to support business planning.

projects.title: Education Support Portal
projects.description: A responsive support platform for managing student enquiries and common questions.
projects.details: The portal gives users a clear website interface and gives staff a dashboard for handling submitted enquiries.

gallery_items.title: AI Service Interface
gallery_items.description: A clean interface design for presenting AI services, service categories and enquiry actions.
gallery_items.details: This gallery item presents a business-facing interface layout with clear service cards, enquiry actions and visual hierarchy for professional visitors.

gallery_items.title: Admin Analytics Workspace
gallery_items.description: A management workspace for reviewing enquiries, chatbot performance and feedback activity.
gallery_items.details: This gallery item highlights the professional admin workspace used for monitoring service demand, enquiry progress and content updates.

gallery_items.title: Chat Support Experience
gallery_items.description: A conversational support interface designed to guide website visitors toward the right service.
gallery_items.details: This gallery item shows how guided conversation can support visitor questions and direct users toward enquiry submission when required.

events.title: AI Innovation Workshop
events.description: A client-focused workshop introducing AI tools for business efficiency.
events.details: This workshop introduced practical AI tools, chatbot walkthroughs, workflow automation examples and the benefits of digital transformation for business clients.

events.title: Digital Automation Showcase
events.description: A showcase of workflow automation and chatbot integration for business teams.
events.details: The event showed how automation can reduce repeated work and how chatbot systems can support customer enquiries across business websites.

events.title: Future of AI Webinar
events.description: An online session about AI-powered software solutions for growing businesses.
events.details: This webinar covers AI adoption, digital product planning, chatbot design and secure digital transformation for small and medium businesses.

articles.title: How AI Chatbots Improve Customer Support
articles.author: AI-Solution Team
articles.summary: AI chatbots answer repeated questions instantly and guide visitors toward the right service.
articles.content: AI chatbots improve customer support by answering repeated questions, collecting basic customer details and guiding users to the correct service page. They reduce waiting time and allow staff to focus on more complex customer needs.

articles.title: Why Small Businesses Need Automation
articles.author: AI-Solution Team
articles.summary: Automation reduces repetitive work and helps teams focus on high-value business activities.
articles.content: Automation helps small businesses reduce repeated manual tasks, improve accuracy and save time for employees and managers. It can be used for enquiry handling, reporting, reminders and internal workflows.

articles.title: Using Data Dashboards for Better Decisions
articles.author: AI-Solution Team
articles.summary: A clear dashboard turns raw data into useful insights for managers and decision-makers.
articles.content: Dashboards organise data into visual reports so managers can understand trends, track performance and make better business decisions. They are especially useful for enquiry trends, customer demand and service performance.

testimonials.name: Daniel Carter
testimonials.quote: AI-Solution helped us understand how automation could improve our customer workflow.

testimonials.name: Sophia Lee
testimonials.quote: The platform was professional, fast and easy for non-technical users to understand.

testimonials.name: Marcus Green
testimonials.quote: Clean interface, useful chatbot and a practical admin dashboard for managing enquiries.

chatbot_faqs.question: What services do you provide?
chatbot_faqs.keywords: service, services, offer, provide, chatbot, automation, analytics, software, ai, development
chatbot_faqs.answer: AI-Solution provides AI chatbot development, business automation, data analytics, digital product planning, web application development and digital employee experience solutions.

chatbot_faqs.question: How much does a project cost?
chatbot_faqs.keywords: price, pricing, cost, budget, fee, charge, package, quote
chatbot_faqs.answer: Project cost depends on the required features and complexity. Please submit your details through the Contact page and our team will prepare a suitable proposal.

chatbot_faqs.question: How can I contact AI-Solution?
chatbot_faqs.keywords: contact, email, phone, enquiry, inquiry, reach, message, call, quote
chatbot_faqs.answer: You can contact AI-Solution by filling out the Contact page with your name, email, phone number, company name, country, job title and project details.

chatbot_faqs.question: How can I track my enquiry?
chatbot_faqs.keywords: track, tracking, enquiry, inquiry, status, reference, id, progress
chatbot_faqs.answer: Use the Track Enquiry page and enter your tracking ID or email address to view the latest enquiry status.

chatbot_faqs.question: What technologies are used?
chatbot_faqs.keywords: technology, technologies, stack, python, django, mongodb, atlas, html, css, javascript
chatbot_faqs.answer: The platform uses Python Django for the backend, MongoDB Atlas for data storage, and HTML, CSS and JavaScript for the frontend.
